subject: Training recap - Demo Company - 2026-04-03
body:
Hello Irene and Iraklis,

I apologize for not being able to attend the last day of the training myself, hopefully Stefano and Camilla were still able to give you the knowledge you needed to complete your own UT inspections.

As I promised during our training, here is the recap email with links to all the useful training slide decks we used. Please save this email somewhere and keep it accessible so you can come back to it whenever you need any information.

Training Materials

1. [Introductory Training for Elios 3](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/119tnl7y4rbrxY2arIrmzdGlgAMgHGfw_cKp-oAsrah0/edit?slide=id.g1e5c6cf8524_0_1106#slide=id.g1e5c6cf8524_0_1106)
This covers everything we went through on the first day. It is your go-to guide if you ever forget how a function works or need a refresher on drone operation.

2. [Indoor Aerial Inspection Methodology (AIIM) Training](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1ZFSMWYPiqnn0XqnyVH9zq9JZtm7AZPzetsBnxe_TvCA/edit?slide=id.g1404b2b07dd_0_1750#slide=id.g1404b2b07dd_0_1750)
This is from our second day and includes step-by-step preparation for inspection missions, including the important reco flights. It is especially useful when preparing for complex missions.

3. [Method Statement Template](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1x32o0np3L3_7bc1rWZyRyzIRU_VwEHWy/edit)
Use this to collect important information from your client. It ensures all mission details are clearly documented.

4. [Risk Assessment Guide](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/1/d/11HQje4sj8dM9Vrf0-uV0okHBsCFbFVY4/edit?gid=469862873#gid=469862873)
This helps classify missions based on their difficulty and risk level. It is a great tool for understanding the experience required and preparing accordingly.

5. [SOP (Standard Operating Procedure)](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1n2-e3jfpFqeQfGmaJ064uicp6ZoYZVsh/view)
Our most up-to-date manual with all pre- and post-inspection steps. I recommend printing it and using it for every mission to maintain high-quality standards.

Other Useful Links
[Intro UT Training Deck]() - Basics about our UT kit and how to use it
[Inspector 5](https://www.flyability.com/inspector) - Software to download drone flight data
[Knowledge Base](https://knowledge.flyability.com/?hsLang=en) - An answer to (almost) all your questions
[Nubigon](https://www.nubigon.com/downloads) - Software for creating point cloud animations
[Customer Toolkit](https://www.flyability.com/customer-toolkit/elios-3) - The Customer Toolkit provides downloadable brand assets, brochures, spec sheets, sample datasets, and media (photos/videos) for Elios 3.

Great to see how your team is building an in-house inspection workflow.

Happy flying.

Wishing you great success with your drone inspections.
Do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Emil Wallnofer
Flyability Pilot & Trainer

---
